Lead Commercial System

OpportunityOS turns federal friction into revenue systems.

Loading the current OpportunityOS position, scored lanes, and cloud-capacity story.

Open Control Plane Startup Proof Innovation Control

Truth boundary: this is the commercialization bridge BosonIT can defend today. The system is built around scored opportunity intake, evidence automation, and secure collaboration rooms rather than inflated prime-contract claims.

Current Read
Product Pillar

Opportunity Intelligence

Score federal and regulated-team signals into fit, margin, delivery path, and proof value instead of reading every notice by hand.

  • Bid-no-bid and teaming signals
  • Requirement and clause extraction
  • Ranked motion queue for BosonIT and future buyers
Product Pillar

Evidence Automation

Package approvals, redaction, records, and supporting proof into governed flows instead of ad hoc document chaos.

  • Machine-readable evidence packets
  • Approval-aware audit trails
  • Export surfaces for reviewers, partners, and buyers
Product Pillar

Mission Rooms

Deploy secure contractor collaboration rooms with Nextcloud, object storage, approvals, and operational telemetry already dogfooded inside BosonIT.

  • Teaming and follow-through rooms
  • Artifact archives and records discipline
  • Mobile approval and operator-facing controls
